workflow.name: Generate B2B lead magnet articles with AI deep research and Google Docs
workflow.description:
## Who is this for?

This workflow is built for B2B marketers, consultants, founders, and agency owners who need to produce high-quality, research-backed thought leadership content — without spending hours on research and writing.

## What this workflow does

This agent-powered workflow takes a simple topic input and transforms it into a comprehensive, professionally formatted lead magnet article saved directly to Google Docs. It runs parallel deep research across 5 strategic angles, compiles the findings, and produces a polished long-form article ready for LinkedIn, your blog, or a downloadable PDF.

## How it works

1. **Topic Input** — You submit a topic via the built-in chat trigger.
2. **Strategic Query Generation** — An AI agent refines your topic into 5 targeted research queries covering market context, pain points, frameworks, case studies, and future trends.
3. **Parallel Deep Research** — Each query is researched independently by an AI agent, producing 400–600 words of data-rich content per section.
4. **Compilation & Structuring** — All research is merged into a structured article with a table of contents, statistics, and sources.
5. **Final Writing & Editing** — A writing agent produces the complete 2,500–4,000 word article with proper formatting.
6. **Google Docs Output** — The article is created as a formatted Google Doc with bold text, headings, and a shareable link.
7. **Tracking** — Each generated article is logged to a Google Sheet for tracking.

## Setup steps

1. **Connect your Ollama instance** — Set up your Ollama API credentials (or swap the LLM node for OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.).
2. **Connect Google Docs OAuth2** — Create OAuth2 credentials for the Google Docs API.
3. **Connect Google Drive OAuth2** — Create OAuth2 credentials for the Google Drive API (used to make the doc shareable).
4. **Connect Google Sheets OAuth2** — Create OAuth2 credentials and update the Sheet URL in the "Log to Tracking Sheet" node to point to your own spreadsheet.
5. **Update author name** — In the "Validate Queries" Code node, change `YOUR_AUTHOR_NAME` to your name.
6. **Activate and test** — Open the chat trigger URL and submit a topic.

## Requirements

- n8n instance (self-hosted or cloud)
- Ollama running locally (or substitute with any supported LLM provider)
- Google Cloud project with Docs, Drive, and Sheets APIs enabled
- OAuth2 credentials for Google services

## How to customize

- **Swap the LLM** — Replace the Ollama Chat Model node with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, or any LangChain-compatible model.
- **Change the output format** — Modify the "Final Editor and Polish" system prompt to produce blog posts, whitepapers, or email sequences instead.
- **Adjust research depth** — Edit the number of strategic queries or word count targets in the agent prompts.
- **Add distribution** — Extend the workflow to post directly to LinkedIn, send via email, or upload to your CMS.

workflow.name: Generate B2B lead magnet articles with AI deep research to Google Docs

parameters.text:
=Take this topic and generate 5 strategic research queries for a B2B lead magnet article.

Topic: {{ $json.chatInput }}

options.systemMessage:
You are a Strategic Research Query Generator for B2B lead magnet content.

Your job is to take a raw topic and transform it into 5 highly strategic research queries that will power a comprehensive authority-building article.

The final output will be a LinkedIn-style lead magnet article designed to establish thought leadership, generate inbound leads, drive consultation bookings, and build trust with B2B buyers.

Target audience: B2B founders, consultants, SaaS leaders, sales teams, agencies.

Return ONLY this JSON. No markdown. No extra text.

{
  "originalTopic": "The raw topic submitted",
  "refinedTopic": "A sharper more compelling version of the topic",
  "articleAngle": "The unique positioning angle for this lead magnet",
  "targetReader": "Specific B2B persona this targets",
  "strategicQueries": [
    {
      "queryId": "q1",
      "query": "Market context research question",
      "purpose": "Establish authority with data",
      "sectionItFeeds": "Market Overview",
      "searchTerms": ["term1", "term2", "term3"]
    },
    {
      "queryId": "q2",
      "query": "Problem deep-dive research question",
      "purpose": "Show understanding of reader pain points",
      "sectionItFeeds": "The Problem",
      "searchTerms": ["term1", "term2"]
    },
    {
      "queryId": "q3",
      "query": "Solution and framework research question",
      "purpose": "Provide actionable value",
      "sectionItFeeds": "The Framework",
      "searchTerms": ["term1", "term2"]
    },
    {
      "queryId": "q4",
      "query": "Case study and proof research question",
      "purpose": "Build credibility with evidence",
      "sectionItFeeds": "Proof & Case Studies",
      "searchTerms": ["term1", "term2"]
    },
    {
      "queryId": "q5",
      "query": "Future predictions research question",
      "purpose": "Position as forward-thinking leader",
      "sectionItFeeds": "Future Outlook",
      "searchTerms": ["term1", "term2"]
    }
  ],
  "proposedTitle": "Compelling article title that attracts clicks",
  "proposedSubtitle": "Supporting subtitle with value proposition",
  "keyInsightToProve": "The ONE big idea this article must prove",
  "competitiveEdge": "What makes this angle different from existing content"
}

Rules:
1. Each query must be specific and actionable
2. Queries should NOT overlap
3. Proposed title must be LinkedIn-worthy
4. searchTerms should be Google-optimized
5. Return ONLY valid JSON

You are a Deep Research Specialist for B2B thought leadership content.

Your job is to conduct thorough research on a specific query and produce rich data-driven content for a lead magnet article.

You are one of 5 parallel research agents. Each handles ONE query. Your output will be compiled with others into a complete article.

Return ONLY valid JSON:

{
  "queryId": "q1",
  "sectionTitle": "Clear compelling section title",
  "sectionContent": "Full section content in markdown. 400-600 words. Include subheadings using ###, bullet points, bold text, and data. Write in an authoritative but accessible tone for LinkedIn readers.",
  "keyStats": [
    {"stat": "73% of B2B buyers...", "source": "Gartner 2024"},
    {"stat": "$4.2 trillion market...", "source": "McKinsey Report"}
  ],
  "quotableInsight": "One powerful sentence that could be pulled as a LinkedIn quote",
  "examples": [
    {"company": "Company Name", "result": "What they achieved", "relevance": "Why it matters"}
  ],
  "actionableFramework": {
    "name": "Framework name if applicable",
    "steps": ["Step 1", "Step 2", "Step 3"]
  },
  "linkedInHooks": ["Hook 1 for this section", "Hook 2"],
  "sources": [
    {"title": "Source title", "url": "https://example.com", "year": "2024"}
  ],
  "seoKeywords": ["keyword1", "keyword2"],
  "wordCount": 500
}

Writing Rules:
1. Write 400-600 words of actual content
2. Include at least 2-3 specific statistics with sources
3. Include at least 1 company example
4. Make it LinkedIn-worthy - punchy insightful shareable
5. The quotableInsight should be tweetable on its own
6. Return ONLY valid JSON no extra text
7. Write like a respected industry thought leader not a textbook

You are an expert B2B content writer.

Write ONLY the article content. Do NOT include:
- Any thinking or planning text
- Phrases like "The user wants" or "Let me analyze"
- Meta-commentary about the writing process

START IMMEDIATELY with the title.

Use this EXACT structure (plain text, no markdown symbols):

[Title]

[Subtitle]

By [Author] | [Date]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

THE BIG IDEA

[2-3 compelling paragraphs with a provocative stat]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

TABLE OF CONTENTS

[List 5 chapters]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CHAPTER 1: [TITLE]

[Content with paragraphs. Mark important stats and company names with {BOLD}text{/BOLD} tags. Mark section headings with {H3}heading{/H3} tags.]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

[Repeat for chapters 2-5]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

KEY TAKEAWAYS

• [Takeaway 1]
• [Takeaway 2]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHAT TO DO NEXT

1. [Action 1]
2. [Action 2]
3. [Action 3]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ABOUT THE AUTHOR

[Bio for author]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SOURCES AND REFERENCES

[Numbered list]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

[CTA]

RULES:
1. Start with the title - NO thinking text
2. Length: 2500-4000 words
3. Include ALL research and statistics
4. Mark text to be bold with {BOLD}text{/BOLD}
5. Mark subheadings with {H3}heading{/H3}
6. Use current date not February 2026
7. Plain text output - formatting tags will be processed later

Write the article now:

parameters.content:
## Generate B2B lead magnet articles with AI deep research to Google Docs

This workflow transforms any topic into a comprehensive, research-backed B2B lead magnet article — automatically saved as a formatted Google Doc.

## How it works
1. **Submit a topic** via the chat trigger
2. **AI generates 5 strategic research queries** covering market context, pain points, frameworks, case studies, and future trends
3. **5 parallel research agents** each produce 400–600 words of data-rich content
4. **Research is compiled** into a structured article with TOC, stats, and sources
5. **A writing agent** produces the final 2,500–4,000 word article
6. **Output is saved** as a formatted Google Doc with bold text and headings
7. **Article metadata** is logged to a Google Sheet for tracking

## Setup steps
1. Configure your **Ollama credentials** (or swap for OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini)
2. Connect **Google Docs OAuth2** credentials
3. Connect **Google Drive OAuth2** credentials
4. Connect **Google Sheets OAuth2** and update the sheet URL in the "Log to Tracking Sheet" node
5. In the "Validate Queries" Code node, replace `YOUR_AUTHOR_NAME` with your name
6. Activate the workflow and open the chat trigger URL

## Customization
- Swap the LLM model to any LangChain-compatible provider
- Adjust word count targets in agent system prompts
- Modify the article structure in the "Final Editor and Polish" prompt
- Add downstream nodes for email delivery, CMS posting, or Slack notifications

## 1. Topic Refinement
User submits a topic via chat. AI refines it into 5 strategic research queries with SEO terms, angles, and target personas.

## 2. Parallel Deep Research
Each of the 5 queries is researched independently by an AI agent, producing stats, examples, frameworks, and quotable insights (400–600 words each).

## 3. Compile & Write Final Article
All research is merged into a structured document. A writing agent produces the complete 2,500–4,000 word lead magnet with formatting tags.

## 4. Format & Publish to Google Docs
Article is created as a Google Doc via API. Bold text and headings are applied programmatically. Public sharing is enabled automatically.

## 5. Deliver & Track
Returns edit, view, and PDF download links to the user via chat. Logs article metadata to Google Sheets for tracking.
⚠️ **Update YOUR_AUTHOR_NAME** in this Code node to your actual name before running the workflow.

user.name: Veena Pandian
user.bio: Veena is a GTM Engineer with 6 years of experience in Revenue Operations, specializing in building scalable outbound systems that turn data into pipeline. As a Clay expert, she designs signal-based prospecting workflows, enrichment automations, and AI-led personalization sequences that drive consistent, qualified meetings for B2B companies. She now brings that same systems-thinking approach to building powerful automations in n8n.
